rag_rules: Fuse annex text only into an existing matching owner declaration from the AADL model.
Keep type-scoped contract content with component types and implementation-scoped bindings with component implementations.
Preserve the original AADL architecture during fusion; do not alter features, subcomponents, connections, properties, or owner names.
generic_rules: Make the smallest possible edit: add or merge the annex block while leaving unrelated text and ordering stable.
If an owner already has an annex of the same kind, merge conservatively instead of creating a duplicate block.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Preserve valid annex wrapper syntax exactly: annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Do not move generated content across scopes because a nearby declaration looks similar.
Do not rewrite structural AADL elements to accommodate annex insertion.
irrelevant_topics: Validator-driven type fixes for AGREE expressions
Using AADL property names or unit tokens as AGREE variables
